response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable C++ experience on Windows platforms and has no exposure to capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains — both mandatory requirements. Their career is centered on web, mobile, and open-source tools using TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with no evidence of SQL Server/Oracle or financial systems development.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Proven track record in open-source contributions and tooling
Excellent communication skills demonstrated through workshops and talks
concerns: No professional C++ experience on Windows as required
No domain expertise in fixed income, capital markets, or banking
SQL experience is listed but not tied to financial systems or enterprise databases like SQL Server/Oracle
